issue.title: BIP32: Define rules for derivation path parsing
issue.body:
### BIP32: Define rules for derivation path parsing

As bitcoin/bips does not allow to create issues, I use this repository. I hope that's alright.
 
The format of BIP32 paths is something that has been discussed in multiple contexts, including recent implementation discussions (e.g., [NBitcoin](https://github.com/MetacoSA/NBitcoin/issues/1258), [embit](https://github.com/diybitcoinhardware/embit/issues/113)) and different BIP PRs ([BIP380 allows `H`](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/1803), [BIP380 disallows `H`](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/1888)).

I'd like to share the results of an attempted differential fuzzing campaign spanning several implementations using [bitcoinfuzz](https://github.com/bitcoinfuzz/bitcoinfuzz). The differences were so significant that fuzzing was basically impossible and I resorted to manual testing. As seen in the table, the current version of BIP32 leaves too much flexibility in interpreting what is and isn't a valid path. This (again?) raises the question of why a standardized notation and invalid test vectors for BIP32 paths have not been defined yet. I wanted to share this mainly as a reference point for further discussion and a possible basis for constructing  a set of valid and invalid BIP32 path test vectors. Feel free to add additional test cases.

Results concern only the path parsing API. 

| **Feature** | **Example** | **[Bitcoin Core](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/ed1795aa17205db6ac15fa7ea1645357740b26ac/src/util/bip32.cpp#L15)** | **[bitcoinj](https://github.com/bitcoinj/bitcoinj/blob/a2b15a25befc7f0142c825fd8720cea20944399b/core/src/main/java/org/bitcoinj/crypto/HDPath.java#L379)** | **[Rust Bitcoin](https://github.com/rust-bitcoin/rust-bitcoin/blob/1d3ed663f4b392ada7ffa0d25ac15faf78650ab4/key_expression/src/bip32.rs#L298)** | **[NBitcoin](https://github.com/MetacoSA/NBitcoin/blob/a5f5f8dd1962001bff4df633016de8e74d00b842/NBitcoin/BIP32/KeyPath.cs#L37)** | **[Bitcoin-S](https://github.com/bitcoin-s/bitcoin-s/blob/18cfbf82084683c90b44630330c66da52d305f35/core/src/main/scala/org/bitcoins/core/hd/HDPath.scala#L85)** | **[libwally-core](https://github.com/ElementsProject/libwally-core/blob/32a17131e40773b3aaef372bad94696f187b700c/src/bip32.c#L242)** | **[embit](https://github.com/diybitcoinhardware/embit/blob/49d900405a1701b88c286193ce270ce2f7e482e1/src/embit/bip32.py#L292)** |
|---|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| can start with `m` | `m/1` | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ |
| can start with M | `M/1` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ |
| can start with number | `1/1` | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ |
| allows only `m` | `m` | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows repeated `m/` | `m/m/1` | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ |
| allows H for hardened index | `m/1H` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ |
| allows h for hardened index | `m/1h` | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ |
| allows `'` for hardened index | `m/1'` | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ |
| allows index > 0x7FFFFFFF | `m/2147483648` | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows index > 0x7FFFFFFF with `'` | `m/2147483648'` | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows index > 0xFFFFFFFF | `m/4294967296` | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows + before zero index | `m/+0` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows - before zero index | `m/-0` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ |
| allows + before non-zero index | `m/+1` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows - before non-zero index | `m/-1` | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows depth > 255 | `m/1/1/.../1` | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows empty path | | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ |
| allows empty segment | `m//1` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЭМ |
| allows trailing / | `m/1/` | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows double trailing / | `m/1//` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows whitespace after index | `m/1 ` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows whitespace before index | `m/ 1` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЬЕ |
| allows whitespace before m | ` m/1` | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ | тЬЕ | тЭМ | тЭМ |
